utility_evaluation.REASONING:
First, count the number of items in the required format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget — that is 6 items total. Next, check the final property solution to see if all appear. 
1) property: Present, includes type, location, price, size, layout, amenities, and HOA fees — fully specified. 
2) financing: Present, includes option, LTV, arrangement_fee — terms are given, so fully specified. 
3) legal_services: Present, includes package, cost, and itemized additional costs — fully specified. 
4) moving_services: Present, includes provider, cost, and additional fees — fully specified. 
5) setup_services: Present, includes electricity and internet providers, setup_fees, monthly costs — fully specified. 
6) total_budget: Present, includes breakdown of property_price, financing_fee, legal_fees_total, survey, moving, setup_fees_total, estimated_monthly_utilities, HOA fees, grand_total_initial_costs — fully specified. All 6 are present and complete.
